display.purpose: Hero headline only (Space Grotesk, tight leading, ceiling ~6rem).

headline.purpose: Section and CTA-block headings, including Bangla CTAs.

body.purpose: Prose and UI text (Geist), measure capped ~65-75ch.

bangla.purpose: All Bangla copy (Hind Siliguri) as a first-class peer to Latin.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked eyebrow, sparingly on hero/CTA blocks with an accent dot.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: The single elevation token, tinted to the slate bg. Light mode; cards only.

shadows.name: card-dark
shadows.purpose: Dark-mode variant of the card shadow.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Fade-up entrance easing (0.7s). The system's signature ease.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Below-the-fold and hero reveals; opacity + 1rem translateY.

motion.name: float-y
motion.purpose: Gentle hero logo bob, transform-only, off under reduced-motion.

motion.name: scroll-reveal
motion.value: fade-up linear both; animation-timeline: view(); animation-range: entry 5% cover 28%
motion.purpose: Scroll-driven section reveal where view-timeline is supported.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button. Forest Green fill, white text, lifts 1px on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #047857; color: #fff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(4 120 87 / 0.4); }

components.name: CTA Pill
components.description: Standalone hero/landing call to action. Pill radius, larger padding, arrow nudges on hover.
components.css: .ds-cta-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #047857; color: #fff; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-cta-pill:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-cta-pill:hover svg { transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-cta-pill svg { transition: transform 0.2s ease; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Bordered surface button; border turns green on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #fff; color: #0f1b2d; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid #e4e9f0; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #047857; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Standard input. Hairline border; green border + 2px green ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; color: #0f1b2d; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid #e4e9f0; border-radius: 12px; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5a6b7d; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #047857; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(4 120 87 / 0.4); }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Soft, slightly-raised card. Hairline border + the single card shadow.
components.html:
Live Session

Join the interactive deck and answer in real time.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; color: #0f1b2d; border: 1px solid #e4e9f0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(15 27 45 / 0.04), 0 10px 24px -14px rgb(15 27 45 / 0.14); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card p { color: #5a6b7d; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Section Kicker
components.description: Uppercase tracked eyebrow with an accent dot. Hero/CTA blocks only.
components.css: .ds-kicker { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #5a6b7d; margin: 0; } .ds-kicker-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #047857; }

components.name: Deep CTA Block
components.description: Drenched deep-forest CTA panel (constant in both themes). White text, bilingual heading, pill CTA.
components.html:
Join in

Learning, made joyful — starting today.

Get started
components.css: .ds-cta-block { background: #0c3b30; border-radius: 24px; padding: 64px 48px; text-align: center; } .ds-cta-block .ds-cta-eyebrow { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.6); margin: 0; } .ds-cta-block h2 { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.15; color: #fff; margin: 16px 0 0; } .ds-cta-block-btn { display: inline-block; margin-top: 32px; background: #047857; color: #fff; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-cta-block-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); }

narrative.overview: Pathshala is a place to do, not just read. The system is built like a clean, bright workbench: a calm cool-slate surface that gets out of the way, with energy and color spent deliberately on the moments that reward the learner. The resting interface is quiet and crisp (Khan Academy x Brilliant restraint); the interactive moments are where the delight lives. It is bilingual at its core: Bangla (Hind Siliguri) and English (Geist / Space Grotesk) are first-class peers, switching mid-sentence without a seam. It rejects corporate e-learning, generic AI-SaaS, and dense academic textbook looks alike. Joyful, never juvenile. No pure black or white anywhere; one green accent locked for all interaction.
keyCharacteristics: Cool slate neutrals at rest; one locked green accent for go.
Soft, slightly-raised cards over flat boxes — a tactile workbench, not a spreadsheet.
Motion is rare and rewarding: fade-ups, scroll reveals, a gentle logo bob.
Light/dark follows system preference, with a manual override that always wins.

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Exactly one accent — Forest Green — carries all interaction (CTAs, primary buttons, focus rings, active states, logo). The categorical palette colors subjects and illustrations only; promoting any --cat-* hue to a second brand accent is forbidden.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black-or-White Rule
rules.body: Light is a cool off-white (#f6f8fb), dark is a slate-navy (#0e1626). #000 and #fff never appear as background or body text.

rules.name: The Two-Token Accent Rule
rules.body: Accent fills use --accent with white text; accent text/dots use --accent-text (green on light, mint on dark). Never set small green text from the fill token.

rules.name: The Peer-Script Rule
rules.body: Bangla is never a downgraded fallback. Any surface that can show Bangla gets Hind Siliguri at full size and proper line-height; mixed Bangla/English in one line must read evenly.

rules.name: The Quiet-Kicker Rule
rules.body: The uppercase tracked label is allowed only as a deliberate eyebrow on hero and CTA blocks (with the accent dot), not stamped above every section.

rules.name: The One-Shadow Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one elevation token. Cards use it; everything else is flat with a hairline border. No layered shadow scale, no glassmorphism.

dos: Do carry all interaction on the one Forest Green accent (#047857); use --accent for fills (white text) and --accent-text for small green/mint text.
Do treat Bangla (Hind Siliguri) as a first-class peer to Latin — full size, proper line-height, even in mixed lines.
Do keep surfaces flat with hairline borders; reach for elevation only via the single --shadow-card token on .surface-card.
Do use cool off-white / slate-navy backgrounds — never #000 or #fff.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion path; content must be fully visible without motion.
Do spend color and motion on interactive rewards (quizzes, polls, deck reveals), keeping the resting interface calm.
donts: Don't promote any --cat-* hue to a second brand accent — categorical colors are for subject-coding and illustration only.
Don't ship the generic AI-SaaS look: no dark-purple gradients, neon glow, glassmorphism cards, or the big-number hero-metric template.
Don't drift into corporate-LMS density — no gray cluttered form-walls, no joyless compliance-module energy.
Don't become a dense academic textbook — no unhierarchied text-walls, no Times-New-Roman seriousness.
Don't go juvenile — no cartoon mascots, crayon-primary palette, or rounded-everything.
Don't use pure black or pure white, gradient text, or border-left color stripes as accents.
